kirundi.soccer_penalty_kick_conversion_rate_is: Igipimo c'intsinzi c'ivyiza vy'igihano muri football ni ~76%
kirundi.nfl_field_goal_success_rate_is_84: Igipimo c'intsinzi c'ibitego vy'ikibuga muri NFL ni ~84%
kirundi.pro_tennis_first_serve_success_rate_is: Igipimo c'intsinzi ca serivisi ya mbere muri tennis y'umwuga ni ~62%
kirundi.explore_probability_through_experiment: Rondera ibishoboka binyuze mu vyigeragezo. Koresha ivyigeragezo maze urabe uko inshuro zigaragara zegera ku ndangagaciro ziteganyijwe.
kirundi.p_h_p_t_0_5_law_of_large_numbers_as_tr: P(H) = P(T) = 0.5. Itegeko ry'imibare minini: uko ivyigeragezo vyiyongera, igipimo c'umutwe cegera 0.5. Nyuma yo guta inshuro 1,000 uzaba uri muri ~3% vya 50%, ariko mu rukurikirane rugufi urwo ari rwo rwose ico ari co cose gishoboka.
kirundi.pick_any_die_size_each_face_equally_li: Toranya ingano y'akadomino iyo ari yo yose. Buri ruhande rushoboka kungana: P = 1/N. Imibare ni imwe muri buri bwoko bw'udukadomino — ico gihinduka ni umugabanyi. d4 ni 1/4, d20 ni 1/20.
kirundi.two_dice_sum_the_triangular_distributi: Igiteranyo c'udukadomino tubiri — ikwirakwizwa rya mpandeshatu
kirundi.roll_two_dice_of_the_chosen_type_and_a: Zungurutsa udukadomino tubiri tw'ubwoko bwatoranyije maze uteranye. Igiteranyo ubu ntikingana: ibiteranyo vyo hagati birasanzwe cane. Kuri 2d6, P(7)=6/36, P(2)=1/36. Niyo mpamvu muri Monopoly abantu bamanuka cane ku mitungo y'icunga — nyuma yo gusohoka muri gereza, 6, 7, 8 ni ibiteranyo bisanzwe cane.
kirundi.equal_area_sectors_equal_probability_u: Uduce dufite ubuso bungana = ibishoboka bingana. Uduce tutangana → gutoranya bifite uburemere. Udukazunguruka ni inzira yoroshe cane ku banyeshure bo mu mashure abanza baja mu ikwirakwizwa ritandukanye.
kirundi.with_replacement_independent_draws_wit: Hamwe no gusimbura: gutoranya kwigenga. Nta: ibishoboka bihinduka kuri buri gutoranya — ibishoboka bishingiye ku bihe. Uburyo nyabwo buri inyuma y'ikwirakwizwa rya hypergeometric n'amahirwe y'imikino y'amakarita.
kirundi.build_any_discrete_distribution_test_t: Ubaka ikwirakwizwa ritandukanye iryo ari ryo ryose. Gerageza itegeko ry'imibare minini hamwe n'amahirwe abogamye, erekana ko hamwe n'ivyigeragezo bihagije igerageza rishobora gusubiza ikibazo ico ari co cose c'imiterere ifunze. Monte Carlo nto.
kirundi.multiply_along_branches_add_across_lea: Gwiza ku mashami; teranya hagati y'amababi. Guta igiceri kabiri: HH HT TH TT buri kimwe 0.25. Ibishushanyo vy'igiti vyaguka kugeza ku bibazo vy'igipimo-fatizo vy'ibizamini vyo kwa muganga n'inyigisho ya Bayes.
kirundi.throw_darts_at_a_unit_square_count_how: Jugunya udusonge ku kibuga gifite impande enye z'igipimo; bara ni dungahe dugwa mu ruziga rw'igice kimwe ca kane rwanditse. π ≈ 4 × (imbere / igiteranyo). Kwegera ni O(1/√N) — buri mubare ukoresha udusonge 100× kurushaho.
kirundi.in_a_room_of_23_the_probability_of_a_s: Mu cumba c'abantu 23, ibishoboka vy'isabukuru y'amavuko isangiwe ni > 50%. Kuri 70 ni > 99.9%. Binyuranye n'ubwenge kuko tubara amagereranya (2 muri 23 = 253), atari abantu. Urugero runyuranye rugaragara cane mu ishure ku bishoboka vyo mu bwenge.
kirundi.without_replacement_each_marble_drawn_: 💡 Nta gusimbura: buri ibuye ryakuruwe rikurwa mu mufuka. Ibishoboka bihinduka nyuma ya buri gutoranya! Umufuka wuzura nanone iyo wabaye ubusa.
kirundi.define_each_event_as_a_fraction_e_g_1_: 🎯 Sigura buri kintu nk'igice — urugero, "inshuro 1 muri 20"
kirundi.drag_sliders_to_set_exact_probability_: 🎨 Kurura ibinyereza kugira ngo ushireho ijanisha nyaryo ry'ibishoboka kuri buri gisubizo.
kirundi.behind_one_door_a_prize_behind_two_goa: Inyuma y'urugi rumwe: igihembo. Inyuma y'ibibiri: ihene. Toranya urugi, umwakira azokwugurura urugi rufite ihene, hanyuma utoranye: guma canke hindura?
kirundi.last_20_manual_stay_plays_green_wins_d: Imikino 20 ya nyuma ya "guma" y'intoki — icatsi gitsinda, umutuku wijimye gutsindwa
kirundi.last_20_manual_switch_plays_green_wins: Imikino 20 ya nyuma ya "hindura" y'intoki — icatsi gitsinda, umutuku wijimye gutsindwa
kirundi.outcome_strips_show_your_last_20_manua: Imirongo y'ibisubizo yerekana imikino yawe 20 ya nyuma y'intoki — icatsi = intsinzi, umutuku = gutsindwa. Inkurikirane zigaragara zikubwira uko kutatomoye vyumvikana koko.
kirundi.math_says_stay_wins_1_3_33_switch_wins: Imibare ivuga: guma gitsinda ≈ 1/3 (33%). Hindura gitsinda ≈ 2/3 (67%). Hamwe n'ivyigeragezo bihagije, imibare itsinda.
kirundi.drop_balls_through_a_peg_grid_each_peg: Ta amabumba binyuze mu rusobe rw'imisumari. Buri musumari uyerekeza 50/50 ibumoso canke iburyo. Nyuma y'amabumba ahagije, histogram iba umurongo wa zogera — inyigisho y'imbibi yo hagati ikora.
kirundi.gold_dashed_line_theoretical_normal_cu: ⬆ Umurongo wa zahabu w'akadomo: umurongo usanzwe w'inyigisho. Hamwe no kuta kwinshi imirongo yawe y'ubunararibonye igomba kuwometseho cane.
kirundi.in_a_room_of_just_23_people_there_s_a_: Mu cumba c'abantu 23 gusa, hari > 50% amahirwe yo ko babiri basangira isabukuru y'amavuko. Kurura ikinyereza kugira ngo urondere!
kirundi.each_has_a_random_birthday_same_color_: Buri 🧑 afite isabukuru y'amavuko itunguranye. Ibara rimwe + urumuri = umubiri uhuye. Ongera ufate icitegererezo kugira ngo urabe inshuro zingahe ihuza rigaragara.
kirundi.multiply_the_two_probabilities_to_get_: 💡 Gwiza ibishoboka vyombi kugira ngo ubone ibishoboka bihuriweho. Ibi bikorwa vyigenga, bityo P(A∩B) = P(A) × P(B).
kirundi.as_you_run_more_trials_the_observed_ba: 💡 Uko ukoresha ivyigeragezo vyinshi, imirongo igaragara igomba kwegera ku nyigisho — iri ni itegeko ry'imibare minini rikora!
kirundi.1000_monte_carlo_pi_trials_error_0_05: Ivyigeragezo 1000+ vya Monte Carlo pi, ikosa < 0.05
kirundi.set_n_23_in_birthday_mode_to_see_the_p: Shira n=23 mu buryo bw'isabukuru y'amavuko kugira ngo urabe paradox
kirundi.all_outcomes_nearly_equal_in_probabili: Ibisubizo vyose hafi bingana mu bishoboka.
kirundi.middle_outcome_dominates_approaches_no: Igisubizo co hagati kiganje. Hamwe n'indobo nyinshi cegera imiterere isanzwe.
kirundi.one_tail_much_heavier_than_the_other_a: Umurizo umwe uremereye cane kurusha undi. Ikwirakwizwa ridahwitse.
kirundi.two_outcomes_share_roughly_equal_proba: Ibisubizo bibiri bisangira ibishoboka hafi bingana, ica gatatu ni gito cane canke kinini.
kirundi.three_sliders_set_the_relative_probabi: Ibinyereza bitatu bishiraho ibishoboka bijanye vy'ibisubizo vyo hasi / hagati / hejuru. Imiterere y'ikwirakwizwa ishirwa muri imwe mu miterere ine itandukanye. Nta manota, nta guhishura — nyereza kandi witegereze.
kirundi.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Fata ibinyereza bibiri bihamye. Imura kimwe. Raba imiterere.
kirundi.explain_how_relative_weights_produce_s: Sigura uko uburemere bujanye bukora imiterere.
kirundi.design_note_discrete_4_shape_classific: Inyandiko y'igishushanyo: ishirwa mu vyiciro ritandukanye rya miterere-4; nta manota y'ireme-rihuye; nta guhishura — ku bushake.
